scenario_config.title: Complex Flood Multi-Tool Forecast Demo
scenario_config.goal: Run a complex flood replay with forecast, ensemble, and correction through MCP tools.

response_json.small_summary: Loaded dataset profile for basin_hourly with 25 rows.
Loaded dataset profile for multistation_hourly with 25 rows.
Loaded model asset profile.
Forecasted 25 steps with 4 models; best RMSE=1945.49.
Ensembled 4 models using bma; consistency=1.00.

Error metrics: NSE=0.389, Bias=-1963.22, RMSE=2563.94. Add predictive features or refine model structure. Apply positive bias correction to reduce systematic under-forecasting. Tune peak handling; peak error remains non-zero.

scenario_config.title: Rolling Update and Reforecast Demo
scenario_config.goal: Run an initial forecast and a deterministic update rerun through MCP tools.

response_json.small_summary: Loaded dataset profile for basin_hourly with 13 rows.
Loaded model asset profile.
Forecasted 13 steps with 4 models; best RMSE=1742.97.
Ensembled 4 models using bma; consistency=1.00.

Error metrics: NSE=0.249, Bias=-1158.74, RMSE=2026.43. Add predictive features or refine model structure. Apply positive bias correction to reduce systematic under-forecasting. Tune peak handling; peak error remains non-zero.
Loaded dataset profile for basin_hourly with 19 rows.
Forecasted 19 steps with 4 models; best RMSE=2194.01.
Ensembled 4 models using bma; consistency=1.00.

Error metrics: NSE=0.313, Bias=-2149.41, RMSE=2887.46. Add predictive features or refine model structure. Apply positive bias correction to reduce systematic under-forecasting. Tune peak handling; peak error remains non-zero.
